item.title: Nikon NEXIV VMF-K6561 Measuring System
item.description: Nikon releases a new commercial video measuring system featuring advanced optical metrology capabilities.

item.title: Twyn AR Platform Enhances Quality Assurance and Reduces Rework at WISAG
item.description: WISAG deploys the Twyn AR platform to modernize visual inspection and commercial quality assurance processes.

item.title: Automating Robotic Pick-and-Place Calibration with Intelligent Vision Technology
item.description: An overview of how intelligent vision technology is automating and improving the commercial efficiency of robotic pick-and-place systems.

item.title: Europe's Machine Vision Future: Insights from Industry Leaders
item.description: Industry leaders discuss the commercial future of the European machine vision market.

item.title: Exploring Innovation at Automate 2026: Humanoid Robots, Machine Vision, and More
item.description: Coverage of the Automate 2026 tradeshow focusing on commercially impactful robotics and machine vision systems.

item.title: A3 Officially Releases GigE Vision 3.0, Opening New Possibilities in Machine Vision
item.description: The release of GigE Vision 3.0 introduces new standards and possibilities for machine vision applications.

item.title: Sereact Raises $110M to Scale Physical AI and Bring ‘Thinking’ Robots to Industry
item.description: Sereact secured $110 million in Series B funding to expand its predictive AI robotic platforms for industrial automation into the US market.
